title: Integrate JIRA and Monday such that subitems create in Jira appears as subitems in Monday. Could anyone help me out here?
excerpt: I created subitems in Jira but they appear as items in Monday. I want to sync them together.

posts.author: varunyadav (Varun Yadav)
posts.cookedHtml: I created subitems in Jira but they appear as items in Monday. I want to sync them together.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @varunyadav! Just hopping in here to see if you were able to find a good solution for this! If not, shoot us a message at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to assist further with this!
